admin_dashboard.navigation: Collapsible left sidebar (w-64 expanded, w-16 collapsed). Dark bg (slate-900) for authoritative contrast, or clean white with right-border.
admin_dashboard.widgets: Dense bento-box data presentation. Use col-span-3 for summary KPI cards, col-span-8 for main charts (Attendance/Leave trends), col-span-4 for feeds/pending approval queues.

employee_dashboard.structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 gap-8 p-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto
employee_dashboard.navigation: Streamlined top navigation or very light sidebar. Needs to feel spacious and friendly.
employee_dashboard.hero_section: col-span-full md:col-span-5. 'Today' status hero card featuring a massive, interactive Check-In/Out button and current status indicator.
employee_dashboard.sidebar_widgets: col-span-full md:col-span-3. Quick action buttons (Apply Leave, WFH, Meeting) and visually clean leave balance rings.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6
surface_styles.modals: rounded-2xl backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/20 overlay for Shadcn Dialogs.

components_customization.buttons: rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200. Primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800. Secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50. Limit use of Primary CTA to one per view.
components_customization.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Text-sm. Sticky header with bg-gray-50. Row hover with bg-gray-50/50. No vertical borders; use subtle horizontal borders (border-gray-100).
components_customization.forms: Use Shadcn Form. Input/Select with rounded-lg, border-gray-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent.
components_customization.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs. Override default background. Use simple underline tabs or pill tabs with bg-gray-100 for active state.

auth_background.description: Modern hallway with abstract art and glass walls. Use as a half-screen background on the login page with a subtle light or dark gradient overlay to ensure legibility.

employee_avatars.description: Professional women in suits, use for profile placeholders or directory avatars.
Diverse group of young professionals, use for team/group cards or org chart placeholders.
Professional portrait, use for individual employee views.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width=1.5 for a clean, premium enterprise feel.

testing.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic fonts. Import 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body) via Google Fonts.
Build two distinctly different dashboard experiences. Admin: Authoritative, data-dense, bento-grid based. Employee: Spacious, action-oriented, welcoming, focusing heavily on today's actions.
Implement the strict status pill colors exactly as defined in 'status_colors'. Do not use gradients for status pills; use the solid, soft backgrounds with colored text and borders provided.

Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structures (bento grids, sidebars). Use Shadcn strictly for interactive logic (Dialogs, Selects, Tables, Calendars) but customize their CSS to match this theme's spacing and radii.
Ensure the authentication page uses a split-screen design, utilizing the provided 'auth_background' image on one side with a subtle overlay, and the login form on the other.
